_note: Token classification for Theorems 5/6 segmentation. The theorems require T_1 to be the USD numéraire. 'usd_stables' are USD-pegged tokens; 'non_usd_fiats' are non-USD fiat-pegged tokens which are *volatile* relative to USD; 'crypto_volatiles' are crypto tokens, also volatile relative to USD. For Theorem 5/6 domain, a position needs T_0 in (non_usd_fiats ∪ crypto_volatiles) and T_1 in usd_stables.
